div.h1: Analysis Phase: Building Dirty Page Table (DPT)
div.p: rec_lsn (recovery log sequence number) = 64-bit LSN of the first log record that dirtied a page. Objective: Determine min_rec_lsn to bound the REDO pass scan range.

DATA INTEGRITY INVARIANT: The rec_lsn for any page $P$ in the DPT must represent the $LSN$ of the earliest modification of $P$ that has not yet been flushed to the non-volatile data file. Therefore, no redo work is required prior to $\min(\text{rec_lsn})$.

g.text: t=1: LSN 100 -> Page P1. Result: DPT[P1].rec_lsn = 100
t=2: LSN 150 -> Page P2. Result: DPT[P2].rec_lsn = 150
t=3: LSN 200 -> Page P1. Result: SKIP (Existing rec_lsn 100 preserved)
t=4: LSN 250 -> Page P3. Result: DPT[P3].rec_lsn = 250
